MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: B. PAREDES; Not Reported.(D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORP. is present. Represented by RAYSHA WATERS.
Attorney JOHN ZANGHI for the plaintiff.
Defendant ROBERT CURRY is present.
Attorney YURI GOTTESMAN appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem MARTE BASSI, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of SEP-30-2013 is vacated.
